name: Tunnel Rat
description: A mangy rat the size of a terrier, eyes glinting red in the torchlight. It hisses and lunges.

name: Cave Bat Swarm
description: A screeching cloud of leathery wings and tiny teeth. They swirl around you, biting from every angle.

name: Warren Spider
description: A pale spider as big as a dinner plate. Its web lines the ceiling, and it drops without warning.

name: Goblin Scrapper
description: A scrawny goblin in mismatched scraps of armor, wielding a jagged knife. More desperate than dangerous.

name: Rubble Slime
description: A quivering blob of grey ooze studded with pebbles and bone fragments. It oozes toward you with mindless hunger.

name: Feral Miner
description: A wild-eyed man in tattered overalls, swinging a pickaxe. Whatever happened down here broke his mind long ago.

name: Alpha Wolf
description: A massive grey wolf with scars across its muzzle. Its pack watches from the shadows, but it attacks alone.

name: Bandit Captain
description: A scarred veteran in patchwork armor, barking orders to underlings who are already dead. He fights on alone with grim determination.

name: Cave Troll
description: A hunched brute with skin like wet stone. It drags a boulder behind it like a toy, grunting with each labored step.

name: The Rat King
description: A monstrous tangle of dozens of rats fused at the tail, grown to obscene size. Hundreds of eyes glare with unified malice, and the mass moves with horrifying coordination.

name: Fungal Crawler
description: A dog-sized insect coated in phosphorescent spores.

name: Cave Lurker
description: A pale, eyeless humanoid that clings to the ceiling and drops on prey.

name: Spore Shambler
description: A shambling mass of fungal growth in a vaguely humanoid shape. It moves slowly but hits with surprising weight.

name: Glowcap Swarm
description: A cloud of tiny luminescent mushroom creatures that attack as one, swarming over victims.

name: Sporecap Brute
description: A hulking fungal creature with a massive mushroom cap for a head. Swings tree-trunk arms with devastating force.

name: Mycelium Guardian
description: A towering pillar of fungal matter with arms like battering rams. It guards the deeper tunnels with mindless devotion.

name: The Mycelium King
description: A towering mass of interwoven fungal tendrils shaped vaguely like a man. Spore clouds billow with each movement.

name: Shard Beetle
description: An insect with a carapace of razor-sharp crystal fragments. It scuttles through narrow crevices.

name: Prism Wisp
description: A floating orb of light that refracts into blinding patterns. Its touch burns like concentrated sunlight.

name: Crystal Spider
description: A spider the size of a large dog, its legs and fangs made of translucent crystal. Webs of fine glass threads glitter in the light.

name: Resonance Stalker
description: A lean predator made of living crystal that vibrates at frequencies that shatter stone. Nearly invisible against the cavern walls.

name: Geode Golem
description: A lumbering construct of hollow crystal, its interior filled with glittering formations. Each step shakes the ground.

name: Facet Matriarch
description: A massive crystalline entity with dozens of faceted eyes. Light bends around her in disorienting patterns.

name: The Prismatic Colossus
description: A creature of living crystal that towers to the ceiling. Light from every source converges on it, creating a blinding aura of refracted color.

name: Drowned Shambler
description: A waterlogged corpse that still moves. Water pours from its mouth as it lurches forward.

name: Cave Eel
description: A blind eel as long as a man, with rows of needle teeth. It senses vibrations in the water with terrifying accuracy.

name: Tide Crawler
description: A massive crustacean with barnacle-encrusted claws. It sidesteps through the flooded tunnels with surprising speed.

name: Salt Wraith
description: A translucent figure made of salt-crusted water. It flows through cracks and reforms to strike.

name: Abyssal Angler
description: A hulking fish-like creature with a bioluminescent lure. Its jaw unhinges to swallow prey whole.

name: Kraken Spawn
description: A writhing mass of tentacles emerging from the dark water. Only a fragment of something much larger.

name: The Drowned Leviathan
description: An ancient sea creature entombed in the flooded depths. It fills the chamber, tentacles reaching from wall to wall, a single enormous eye fixing on you with cold intelligence.

name: Bone Rattler
description: A skeleton reassembled wrong -- too many arms, joints bending the wrong way. It moves with a horrible clicking sound.

name: Marrow Leech
description: A pale worm that burrows through bone. It surfaces to feed, draining the marrow from living creatures.

name: Skull Sentinel
description: A floating skull wreathed in pale flame. It guards the ossuary corridors, shrieking when intruders are detected.

name: Grave Warden
description: An armored skeleton wielding ancient weapons. Unlike the mindless rattlers, this one fights with discipline and purpose.

name: Bone Colossus
description: A giant assembled from hundreds of skeletons fused together. It towers over the ossuary halls, each step grinding bone to dust.

name: Lich Remnant
description: The decayed remains of an ancient sorcerer. Pale fire dances in its eye sockets and its bony fingers crackle with necrotic energy.

name: The Charnel King
description: A massive figure assembled from thousands of bones, seated on a throne of ribcages. Eye sockets burn with pale fire. When it rises, the walls themselves shed bones to rebuild it.

name: Cinder Imp
description: A small creature of hardened ash and glowing embers. It cackles as it hurls balls of molten slag.

name: Magma Beetle
description: An armored beetle the size of a cart, its carapace glowing with volcanic heat. Lava drips from between its plates.

name: Ash Stalker
description: A lean predator coated in volcanic ash. It blends perfectly with the scorched terrain and strikes from concealment.

name: Lava Slime
description: A blob of semi-molten rock that oozes across the floor. It absorbs blows and retaliates with searing heat.

name: Obsidian Sentinel
description: A humanoid figure of volcanic glass, moving with mechanical precision. Cracks in its surface glow with inner fire.

name: Pyroclast Wyrm
description: A serpentine creature that swims through molten rock. It surfaces to attack, spraying lava in wide arcs.

name: The Forge Titan
description: A creature of slag and flame that rises from the magma itself. Its body is a furnace, its fists are anvils, and its rage is volcanic.
